tested_questions.question: How does AI affect human creativity?
Does AI assistance improve idea quality or reduce diversity?
tested_questions.mode: mock fixture abstract-first plus full fixture graph spine

tested_questions.question: How do artists/designers describe originality, style, or visual novelty?
tested_questions.audit_note: Purpose classifier labels visual/style affordance correctly, but fixture evidence remains AI-diversity rather than artist/designer originality/style evidence.

tested_questions.question: What makes human-AI co-creation preserve or reduce agency?
tested_questions.audit_note: Ranking prefers the co-creation TEI fixture, but accepted abstract evidence still centers idea diversity, not agency preservation.

packet_recommendations.audit_note: Full fixture report recommendation misdiagnoses missing_quote_span as unmapped low-priority demo-loop diagnostics.

top_blockers: Acquisition status/parser metadata is not consistently persisted into source metadata for the full fixture graph path.
Abstract-first runs produce only one accepted claim per question and reuse the same narrow fixture evidence across unrelated questions.
Packet recommender does not map missing_quote_span and can fall through to low-priority demo-loop diagnostics.
Evidence atoms are mostly weak/not_ready and remain one-claim objects despite useful quote/concept structure.
The graph has meaningful typed edges, but only two relationship edges in the full fixture proof.
next_recommended_packet: Phase4-P6-web-adapter plus acquisition-status persistence and recommender precedence fix
